summary: Completed testing of bug fixes: 1) Processos year filter now working correctly - GET /api/processos?ano=2025 returns 70 processos, 2) DOEM PDF generation with custom header (brasão) and footer images working correctly

issues: Console warning about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - minor rendering issue that doesn't affect functionality

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: 1) Processos year filter - The 'ano' field is now extracted from numero_processo (e.g., PRC - 0006/2025 -> ano=2025). GET /api/processos/anos returns anos=[2026, 2025] with ano_atual=2025. GET /api/processos?ano=2025 returns exactly 70 processos. 2) DOEM PDF - Custom header with brasão (brasao_doem_small.png) and footer (rodape_doem_small.jpg) images are embedded in PDF. PDF generation returns 118KB file with valid PDF structure.
